candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Current assets excl cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Current assets excluding cash, not the full ACT definition.
Balancing/subtotal artifact, not a reported line item to prefer.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement carryforward of ending cash, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet date amount.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Also looks like a total current liabilities line in one period, but the explicit total line is cleaner.
Balancing/component line, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total line over the less consistent Current liabilities label.

candidates.why: Exact semantic match for current portion of debt / short-term debt; preferred over lease-related lines and despite blanks in preview.
Long-term overdrafts are non-current by wording, not STD.

variables.notes: Chose the clean debt-maturity line. Excluded lease-related current portion rows per STD baseline rule.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct balance-sheet PPE line; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Could include right-of-use assets or other tangible assets; not as clean as the explicit PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing artifact, not preferred when clean reported line exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit PPE line; excluded right-of-use assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, the values match net cash flow from operating activities after working capital changes; best fit for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working capital, not the final net operating cash flow target.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chose outside the clean wording expectation because the reported values align with net cash flow from operating activities; the label appears concatenated with the next section header.
